featuredUpdates.title: Weller Single Barrel is the kind of bottle people watch for.
featuredUpdates.body: A premium wheated bourbon with strong collector appeal for shoppers who like to watch for limited bottles.

featuredUpdates.title: Fortaleza Blanco brings real agave tradition into focus.
featuredUpdates.body: A standout blanco tequila for shoppers looking for artisanal, premium, and collector-worthy agave bottles.

featuredUpdates.title: Featured spirits, seasonal bottles, and special releases are worth checking often.

tastingUpdates.title: Tasting tables make new bottles easier to discover.
tastingUpdates.body: Bullfrog Wine & Spirits uses in-store tasting setups to help customers discover new ready-to-drink options, flavor samples, and event-weekend favorites while they shop.

tastingUpdates.title: Brand reps, samples, and real-time recommendations
tastingUpdates.body: Tasting tables give shoppers a more personal way to compare flavors, ask questions, and find something that fits the occasion.

tastingUpdates.title: Five Farms Irish Cream brings a polished tasting story.
tastingUpdates.body: Cream liqueurs, dessert pours, and seasonal bottles are easier to discover when shoppers can sample and compare them in person.
tastingUpdates.alt: Five Farms Irish Cream promotional tasting graphic

tastingUpdates.title: Happy Dad event displays make the store feel active.
tastingUpdates.body: Customer photos, themed displays, and brand setups bring extra energy to weekend shopping and in-store promotions.

tastingUpdates.title: Friendly in-store moments help events feel personal.
